items.title_en: U.S. Navy ends blockade of Iran's ports and coastal areas
items.title_zh: 美国海军结束对伊朗港口和沿海地区的封锁
items.desc_en: The Navy on Thursday lifted its blockade of Iran's ports and coastal areas at the direction of President Donald Trump.
items.desc_zh: 周四，美国海军按照唐纳德·特朗普总统的指示解除了对伊朗港口和沿海地区的封锁。

items.title_en: Kalshi traders see greater than 50% odds the Fed will hike rates this year
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员预计美联储今年加息的可能性超过 50%
items.desc_en: The Federal Reserve suggested higher rates could be in the cards, and traders on Kalshi see growing odds of a hike in 2026.
items.desc_zh: 美联储暗示可能会加息，卡尔希交易员认为 2026 年加息的可能性越来越大。

items.title_en: Trump DNI pick Pulte poised to get access to U.S. intelligence despite congressional bid to thwart
items.title_zh: 特朗普国家情报总监任命普尔特准备接触美国情报，尽管国会试图阻止
items.desc_en: With President Donald Trump halting his nomination of  U.S. Attorney Jay Clayton as director of national intelligence, Bill Pulte is set to take on the role.

items.desc_en: The stock move could make SpaceX the largest company in the world.
items.desc_zh: 此次股票变动可能使 SpaceX 成为世界上最大的公司。

items.desc_en: The Saudi tankers switched their transponders on Thursday after hiding their location for more than two months.
items.desc_zh: 沙特油轮在隐藏位置两个多月后于周四更换了应答器。

items.title_en: Vance says U.S. isn’t giving Iran ‘a cent’ as he defends Trump peace deal

items.desc_zh: 副总统 JD 万斯表示，“伊朗获得这些资源的唯一途径……是他们完全遵守”协议条款。
